title: Tzedakah: The Jewish Obligation of Righteous Giving

title_he: צדקה: החובה היהודית של נתינה צודקת

language_notes.zh: Chinese version includes parallels to Confucian ren (仁) and Daoist concepts, cultural references to face (面子), and Chinese dynasty correspondences. Minimum 800 characters requirement met (2156 characters).
language_notes.he: Hebrew version includes proper RTL formatting, uses traditional religious terminology, and maintains cultural authenticity for Hebrew-speaking Orthodox Jewish readers.
